name: claude-superpack
description: 33-skill agentic system for Claude Code: orchestration, persistent memory, codebase knowledge graph, security scanning, token optimization, workflow automation, and self-improving learning.

interface.shortDescription: 33-skill agentic system: orchestration + memory + knowledge graph + security + testing + learning.
interface.longDescription: Claude Superpack v4 transforms Claude Code into a self-improving agentic system with 33 skills across 11 categories. ORCHESTRATION: auto-classify requests (A/B/C/D), decompose into DAGs, detect conflicts, spawn isolated workers, merge results. MEMORY: persistent context across sessions — recent (48h rolling), long-term (distilled patterns), and per-project state. KNOWLEDGE GRAPH: zero-dependency structural mapping of any codebase using only Glob/Grep/Read, with blast-radius-aware code review that reads 80-90% fewer files. TOKEN EFFICIENCY: budget tracking, smart file discovery, skill reuse detection. SECURITY: secret detection, injection scanning, OWASP risk checks. QUALITY & TESTING: test mapping, test generation, dependency analysis. WORKFLOW: pre-flight checks, post-execution review, git-aware rollback. DOCUMENTATION: auto-generated docs, changelogs. COMMUNICATION: clarifying questions, session recaps. ONBOARDING: codebase architecture summaries, migration planning. LEARNING: pattern tracking, user preference profiling, dead code detection, and a persistent error+fix catalog.
defaultPrompt: Fix a bug, add tests, and update docs safely.
Refactor the auth module across all consumers.
What depends on the database module?
Remember what we decided about the auth architecture.
Show me the blast radius for this change.
What errors have we seen before in this project?
